title: KIDS BLOCK 1 FINAL: First letter test
description: First milestone — type these short words at 18 WPM
text: cat dog fish bee ant cow ask sad lad fall add jak dad

tips.text: 18 WPM is great for a beginner

tips.target: cat dog fish bee ant cow

tips.text: Block 2 brings more letters and more fun words

tips.target: ask sad lad fall add jak dad

character_tips.anna: 🎯 First milestone, little friend! You did it! 🌸
character_tips.maxim: First block done. Solid foundation for a young typist.
character_tips.knopych: BLOCK 1 DONE! 🎉 Tiny typist becomes Big Typist!
character_tips.klavochka: My darling, you finished! 🎉🎉🎉 First star earned ⭐
